To build **VJsTV as the IMDb of VJ culture**, the best way is to catalog the **entire technological ecosystem behind visual performance**.
Below is a **structured “Arsenal of Visual Performance Technology”**, covering everything VJs, AV artists, and touring visual designers use.

---

# THE ARSENAL OF VISUAL PERFORMANCE TECHNOLOGY

## 1. VJ SOFTWARE (Live Performance Tools)

Software used to mix visuals live like DJs mix music.

* Resolume Arena
* Resolume Avenue
* TouchDesigner
* VDMX
* Modul8
* HeavyM
* Smode
* Millumin
* Magic Music Visuals
* ArKaos GrandVJ
* ArKaos MediaMaster

---

# 2. REALTIME VISUAL PROGRAMMING

Used to build custom generative visuals and AV performances.

* TouchDesigner
* Max/MSP
* Notch
* vvvv
* Processing
* OpenFrameworks
* Unity
* Unreal Engine

---

# 3. MEDIA SERVERS (Touring / Stage Production)

Professional systems used for festivals, concerts, and arenas.

* Disguise GX Media Server
* Hippotizer Media Server
* Resolume Arena
* Pandoras Box
* Watchout

---

# 4. PROJECTION SYSTEMS

## Video Projectors

Manufacturers used in festivals and installations:

* Barco
* Christie
* Panasonic
* Epson

Types:

* Laser projectors
* 4K projectors
* Ultra-short throw projectors
* Mapping projectors

---

# 5. PROJECTION MAPPING SOFTWARE

* MadMapper
* HeavyM
* Resolume Arena
* TouchDesigner

Used for:

* building projection mapping
* stage mapping
* dome projection
* sculpture projection

---

# 6. LED SCREEN TECHNOLOGY

Large LED walls are now the **dominant display medium in concerts and festivals**.

### LED Panel Manufacturers

* ROE Visual
* Absen
* Unilumin
* Leyard

### LED Formats

* Indoor LED walls
* Outdoor LED walls
* Transparent LED
* Flexible LED panels
* LED floors
* LED cubes

---

# 7. VISUAL CONTENT CREATION SOFTWARE

Tools used to create the visuals before performance.

### Motion Design

* Adobe After Effects
* Cinema 4D
* Blender

### 3D Rendering

* Octane Render
* Redshift

---

# 8. AI VISUAL GENERATION

Emerging tools used by experimental VJs.

* Stable Diffusion
* Runway
* Midjourney

Used for:

* generative visuals
* realtime image synthesis
* AI-driven motion graphics

---

# 9. VIDEO INPUT HARDWARE

Devices that bring external video sources into the VJ system.

* HDMI capture cards
* SDI capture cards
* Blackmagic capture devices

Example:

* Blackmagic DeckLink

---

# 10. CONTROLLERS (Live Control)

Hardware used to manipulate visuals during performance.

### MIDI Controllers

* Akai APC40
* Novation Launchpad
* Livid OhmRGB

### Touch Interfaces

* iPad controllers
* OSC apps
* Touchscreen control surfaces

---

# 11. CAMERA & LIVE VIDEO FEEDS

Used for real-time video manipulation.

* DSLR cameras
* PTZ cameras
* webcams
* cinema cameras

Popular brand:

* Blackmagic Design

---

# 12. SIGNAL & VIDEO ROUTING

Infrastructure that connects everything.

### Standards

* HDMI
* SDI
* DisplayPort
* NDI

### Networking

* video-over-IP systems
* fiber optic distribution

---

# 13. LIGHTING + VISUAL INTEGRATION

Many modern shows sync lighting with visuals.

Lighting control software:

* GrandMA
* Resolume Arena

Protocols:

* DMX
* ArtNet
* OSC

---

# 14. XR / VIRTUAL PRODUCTION

New tools merging VJing with film production.

* Unreal Engine
* Disguise

Used for:

* LED virtual stages
* XR concerts
* virtual festivals

---

# 15. IMMERSIVE VISUAL SYSTEMS

### Dome Projection

Planetarium-style shows.

Tools:

* fulldome rendering
* dome mapping software

### 360° Installations

* immersive art exhibitions
* audiovisual rooms

---

# If You Want to Turn This Into a **VJsTV Database**

The platform could index **every piece of technology used in visual performance** like IMDb indexes films.

Example schema:

```
Artist
Performance
Visual Software
Hardware
Visual Style
Festival
Studio
```

Example entry:

```
Artist: Android Jones
Software: TouchDesigner
Hardware: Barco projectors
Style: Psychedelic generative visuals
Festival: Burning Man
```

---

✅ If you want, I can also give you:

* **The 100 most used VJ tools ever**
* **All VJ software ever created (full historical list)**
* **All visual artists in electronic music tours**
* **The complete VJ ecosystem map (artists, studios, festivals, gear)**

That would become the **core data structure for VJsTV — the IMDb of Visual Performance.**
